title: maneh #4488
definition:
1) maneh, mina, pound
    1a) 60 shekels and 1/50 talent (of silver)
        1a1) 1/60 talent in early Babylonian standard
    1b) 100 shekels and 1/100 talent (of gold)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) maneh, mina, pound
    1a) 60 shekels and 1/50 talent (of silver)
        1a1) 1/60 talent in early Babylonian standard
    1b) 100 shekels and 1/100 talent (of gold)

    NASB:  maneh, mina (a measure of weight or money)
